evidence.claim: The user is a patient with symptoms to report.
evidence.fact: Patients log their ailments into the platform to begin the evaluation workflow.
evidence.user_story_span: The user is a patient with symptoms to report
evidence.fact_span: Patients log their ailments into the platform

evidence.claim: The system needs to process symptom information.
evidence.fact: The system calculates a triage score based on reported symptoms to assign a priority rank.
evidence.user_story_span: The system needs to process and store symptom information
evidence.fact_span: The system calculates a triage score based on reported symptoms
